function.name: run_custom_test
function.arguments:
{"code":"from Bio.Graphics import BasicChromosome as BC
from Bio.Graphics.BasicChromosome import Chromosome
from reportlab.graphics.shapes import Drawing
from reportlab.lib.units import inch


def bc_chromosome_draw_label(self, cur_drawing, label_name):
    # Calculate the x position for the label
    start_x = self.start_x_position
    end_x = self.end_x_position
    label_x = (min(start_x, end_x) + max(start_x, end_x)) / 2
    label_y = self.start_y_position + 10  # Adjust y position to draw above the chromosome

    # Draw the label using the provided label_name
    cur_drawing.add(BC.Text(label_x, label_y, label_name, fontSize=self.title_size))


def main():
    # Monkey-patch the drawing method
    Chromosome._draw_label = bc_chromosome_draw_label

    # Prepare drawing canvas
    dwg = Drawing(400, 100)

    # Create a chromosome and set drawing coordinates
    chrom = Chromosome('Chr1')
    chrom.start_x_position = 350
    chrom.end_x_position   = 50
    chrom.start_y_position = 20
    chrom.title_size       = 14

    # Draw label above the chromosome with reversed coordinates
    chrom._draw_label(dwg, 'Chromosome 1')

    # Save to SVG for verification
    dwg.save(formats=['svg'], outDir='.', fnRoot='test_chrom_label_reversed')
    print('SVG saved as test_chrom_label_reversed.svg')


if __name__ == '__main__':
    main()","test_snippet":"# Test with reversed coordinates
from Bio.Graphics import BasicChromosome as BC
from Bio.Graphics.BasicChromosome import Chromosome
from reportlab.graphics.shapes import Drawing


def test_bc_chromosome_draw_label():
    dwg = Drawing(400, 100)
    chrom = Chromosome('Chr1')
    chrom.start_x_position = 350
    chrom.end_x_position = 50
    chrom.start_y_position = 20
    chrom.title_size = 14
    chrom._draw_label(dwg, 'Test Label')
    # Check if the label is drawn correctly
    assert dwg.contents[0].text == 'Test Label'
    assert dwg.contents[0].x == (min(350, 50) + max(350, 50)) / 2
    assert dwg.contents[0].y == chrom.start_y_position + 10

test_bc_chromosome_draw_label()"}
